news.title: Bought this Sovereign Gold Bond in 2021? Your Rs 1 lakh investment is now worth nearly Rs 2.98 lakh
news.description: The Reserve Bank of India has set the premature redemption price for SGB 2021-22 Series-IV. Investors can redeem these bonds prematurely from July 20, 2026, after five years. Tax rules apply to capital gains on premature redemption of these bonds.

news.title: Satan's 19th-Century Bank Note
news.description: In the early 19th century ‘filthy rags’ – or banknotes – became a common form of currency. A surge in forgery followed, accompanied by a surge in harsh prosecutions. How did we get from gold to paper?

news.title: NRI insurance: Benefits, risks, and features of GIFT City’s dollar-denominated insurance plans
news.description: Global exposure, including oil & gold ETFs, and hedge against rupee depreciation are key draws of GIFT City ULIPs; but the market is nascent and experts caution against mixing insurance with investments.

news.title: Sensex, Nifty Fall as Oil Tops $90 a Barrel on Iran War Escalation, Private Bank Stocks Lead Losses
news.description: Indian markets opened lower as US-Iran tensions drove oil prices above $90 a barrel. Weak earnings from private banks added pressure, with Sensex and Nifty indices both declining significantly.
